sections.heading: Document Overview
sections.content: The document is a Court Notice with a target contract execution date of April 15, 2024 [2d7d5fb335ce].

sections.heading: Parties Involved
sections.content: The parties involved include Rajesh Mehta, Ananya Sharma, M/s TechBuild Constructions Pvt. Ltd., and Mr. [857306549920, 7f2958eec97d].

sections.heading: Key Dates & Deadlines
sections.content: Key dates include April 1, 2024, March 31, 2025, and April 15, 2024 [857306549920, 2d7d5fb335ce].

sections.heading: Financial Terms
sections.content: The monthly rent is Rs. 22,000/- and the security deposit is Rs. 66,000/- [63ec09f6bf62, ebc26f7dd819].

sections.heading: Key Obligations & Clauses
sections.content: The tenant shall pay rent by the 5th of each month and the landlord is responsible for major structural repairs [86900ccabd38, f868eb2922e4].

sections.heading: Flags & Risk Items
sections.content: Flags include [FLAG - UNFAVORABLE], [FLAG - REVIEWNEEDED], and liability cap at 3 months contract value [9e24d5f353a3].

sections.heading: Recommended Actions
sections.content: Recommended actions include negotiating Clause 4.2, Clause 8.1, and obtaining legal sign-off before execution [c5dcd7449c50, 2d7d5fb335ce].
